description: Expected index map after folding all 5 operations from chain.json in canonical order (createdAt ascending, operationCID ascending tiebreak, branch-inclusive).

note: Operations are referred to by their 0-based `sequence` field. Branch A (sequence 2, 01-03) removed key aaa; branch B (sequence 3, 01-04) re-set it later in canonical order, so the remastered entry wins (last-applied wins). Key ccc is the degenerate set-membership case ({}). The `reorder` delta in sequence 4 is an unknown shape and is skipped deterministically. The head is sequence 4 (highest createdAt among the two tips, sequences 2 and 4); it is a set, not a delete, so the chain is live and the fold applies.
